metadata.title: Chronology
metadata.description: Provides a calendar and a timeline of the notes creation and modification

regex.source: .error("forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported")
regex.target: .error("forceFrameRate 接受一个介于 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制帧率超过 125 fps。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Adds an icon to the ribbon to open sidebar")
regex.target: .setDesc("在功能区添加一个图标以打开侧边栏")

regex.source: .setDesc("Used to display the daily indicator in the calendar")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于在日历中显示每日指标")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Default will use the one from your locale (${l[r]}). A plugin restart is required.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`默认将使用您所在地区的设置 (${l[r]})。需要重启插件。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("The name of the metadata attribute to use for creation date")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于创建日期的元数据属性名称")

regex.source: .setDesc("The name of the metadata attribute to use for modified date")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于修改日期的元数据属性名称")

regex.source: "Opens the chronology sidebar when Obsidian starts."
regex.target: "当 Obsidian 启动时，打开 chronology 侧边栏。"

regex.source: "Prefers a List of notes, for day and week view"
regex.target: "偏好以列表形式显示笔记，适用于日视图和周视图"

regex.source: "Group notes in same time slot in the timeline view"
regex.target: "在时间线视图中将同一时间段的笔记分组"

regex.source: "Compute heat for each day in the calendar"

regex.target: "在时间线中使用24小时显示模式"
